mode_module.title: Cloudflare Build Mode
mode_module.purpose: Guide implementation of Cloudflare Workers, Pages Functions, bindings, storage, queues, workflows and edge runtime changes.

entry_conditions.condition: Task requires Cloudflare code, configuration or deployment implementation.

required_actions.action: Load the relevant Cloudflare reference modules from this bundle.
Declare required bindings, vars, secrets and environment differences.
Check runtime limits and compatibility date impact before proposing production behaviour.
Separate local simulation evidence from deployed Cloudflare validation evidence.

stop_conditions.condition: Requested Cloudflare behaviour is not grounded in developers.cloudflare.com.
Required production account state, binding names, route ownership or secrets are unknown.
